mnemonics.title: Catch Me If You Can
mnemonics.content: C - Catch subclass exceptions first, M - More specific before general, I - In order of their appearance, Y - You can't catch what's not thrown, C - Clean code with multi-catch clauses

mnemonics.title: PETALS
mnemonics.content: P - Prioritize Exceptions by Type, E - Evaluate catch blocks top-to-bottom, T - Throw specific exceptions before general, A - Avoid unreachable catch blocks, L - Log or handle exceptions always, S - Separate sibling catches

mnemonics.title: Specific Speeds Success
mnemonics.content: S - Specific exceptions caught first, P - Prevents unreachable code, E - Ensures precise error handling, E - Enhances code readability, D - Different actions per exception type, S - Success in exception handling
